footer.tagline: A career and education consultancy connecting applicants, advisors, and institutions — by application, since 2014.

hero.title:
Your Future deserves

a real plan.
hero.lede: Career 360 Consult is a career and education consultancy for students and professionals serious about their next move — connecting applicants, advisors, and institutions inside one cohesive advisory environment.

why.title: Built on qualified conversations.
why.lede: We replaced instant booking with a quiet application process. The people we meet with arrive prepared, and so do we.

advisory.title: Application-Based Advisory
advisory.copy: We don't take walk-ins. Every consultation begins with a structured intake so your time with our advisor is focused, prepared, and outcome-driven.

specialists.title: Career & Education Specialists
specialists.copy: Twelve years guiding Ghanaian students into top universities, scholarships, and global careers. You get senior insight, not generic web advice.

endToEnd.title: End-to-End Support
endToEnd.copy: From shortlist to admission, scholarship application to visa interview — one consultancy walks the full path with you.

howItWorks.title: Three steps from enquiry to confirmed session.

submit.title: Submit Your Application
submit.copy: Tell us about your goals, background, and the decision you're trying to make. Six minutes, structured and private.

review.title: We Review and Qualify
review.copy: Our team reviews your context within 48 hours and confirms whether a consultation is the right next step.

meet.title: Meet Your Advisor
meet.copy: If approved, you receive a calendar invite and a Google Meet link for your one-on-one advisory session.

services.title: Where we do our best work.
services.lede: Pick the area closest to your goal. Every engagement starts the same way — a short application, a real review, then a real session.

admissions.title: University Admissions
admissions.copy: Shortlist building, application strategy, personal statement coaching, and decision support for undergraduate and postgraduate study.

scholarship.title: Scholarship Strategy
scholarship.copy: Funding fit analysis, essay review, and interview preparation for Chevening, Mastercard Foundation, Commonwealth, and Fulbright pathways.

career.title: Career Transition
career.copy: Repositioning, CV strategy, and interview readiness for professionals moving across industries, geographies, or seniority levels.

corp.title: Building a team? We work with organizations too.
corp.copy: Onboarding programs, internal mobility, leadership transitions. Same application-first process, scoped to your organization.

storiesSection.title:
Real people,

real outcomes.
storiesSection.lede: A small selection of clients we've worked with recently. Names shortened for privacy; outcomes confirmed by the applicants themselves.

akosua-b.quote: I came in unsure between two career paths and walked out with a one-year plan that finally felt like mine. The advisory was practical, kind, and never generic.

kwadwo-m.quote: They helped me shape an SOP that actually sounded like me, then walked me through every step of my Mastercard Foundation application until the offer came in.

nana-a.quote: Career 360 reviewed my CV, prepped me for three interviews, and connected me with mentors in my field. I had two offers within six weeks.

efua-o.quote: I had three rejections before I came in. We rebuilt my application from scratch, reframed my story, and the next round produced two acceptances.

jojo-k.quote: The intake form felt rigorous before the call — and it was. By the time we met, my advisor already knew exactly what to challenge me on.

adwoa-y.quote: What I valued most was the honesty. They told me which schools were a stretch and which were a fit. That clarity saved me a year.

placementsSection.title: Universities our clients now call home.
placementsSection.lede: Twelve years of admissions and scholarship work, across eight countries and counting.

blogSection.title: Latest from our writing desk.
blogSection.lede: We write about the questions our applicants ask most. No SEO filler — only things that change how you apply.

applyCta.title:
Begin with an application.

We'll take it from there.
applyCta.lede: Most applicants hear back from us within 48 hours. There is no obligation, and there is no charge to apply.

hero.lede: Application-based consultations across admissions, scholarships, and career strategy — designed for students and professionals who want senior guidance, not generic advice.

offerings.lede: Application-based, senior-led consultations across admissions, scholarships, and career strategy — built for clients who want clarity over template advice.

admissions.title: University Admissions
admissions.excerpt: From a long-list of dreams to a short-list of real, fit-tested options. We help you build an application that reads like you on your sharpest day — not a template, not a brag sheet. Our advisors have walked applicants through every step of the funnel for over a decade, across UK, US, EU, Canadian, Australian, and South African admissions cycles. We tell you when a school is a stretch, when it's a fit, and when it's a quiet mistake — early enough for the answer to matter.
points: Shortlist building tied to fit, funding, and admit probability across geographies
Personal statement & SOP coaching across multiple drafts, with line-level feedback
Application timeline, references, and decision support all the way to offer day
Post-offer guidance: deferral strategy, scholarship negotiation, visa preparation

scholarship.title: Scholarship Strategy
scholarship.excerpt: Scholarships reward applicants who can connect their story to a funder's mission — clearly, credibly, and without performance. We walk you through fit analysis, essays, and interviews for the awards you actually have a real chance at, not the ones that simply sound prestigious. Every funder has a thesis about the kind of leader they want to back; the work is helping yours come into focus on the page and in the room.
points: Funder-fit analysis before you write a single essay — Chevening, Mastercard, Commonwealth, Fulbright, DAAD
Essay coaching that protects your voice while sharpening your argument
Interview preparation with structured mock sessions and recorded feedback
Application logistics: references, endorsements, and submission strategy

career.title: Career Transition
career.excerpt: Whether you're crossing industries, geographies, or seniority levels, the question is the same: how do you tell the story so the next hire feels obvious? We help you reposition without losing the thread of who you are — the people who hire well don't reward repackaging, they reward clarity. From CV and LinkedIn to negotiation framing, we focus on the parts of the move that actually compound.
points: CV & LinkedIn strategy framed for your next-level role, not your last one
Interview readiness across technical, behavioural, and case rounds
Negotiation framing for offers, relocations, equity, and counter-offers
Six-month positioning plan so the next move sets up the one after

process.lede: Application-based, structured, and senior from the first reply. No walk-ins, no generic templates.

apply.title: Apply
apply.copy: A structured intake on your goals, background, and the decision you're navigating — read by a senior advisor.

review.title: Review & Qualify
review.copy: Within 48 hours we confirm whether a consultation fits and which advisor on the team is right for you.

session.title: Advisory Session
session.copy: A focused one-on-one with your advisor — we surface options you missed and leave you with a clear next step.

ongoing.title: Ongoing Support
ongoing.copy: If you continue, we walk the full path with you — drafts, deadlines, interviews — until you have an outcome.

qualification.lede: We turn down more applications than we accept. Senior advisory takes time — we'd rather be straight about fit than burn yours.

fit.title: You'll get the most out of this if you...
items: Are 6–24 months from a real decision point — admissions cycle, funding deadline, or career move.
Have done your own homework and want senior advisory on what to do with it.
Will commit to drafts, deadlines, and honest feedback — even when it's uncomfortable.
Value clarity and direction over reassurance.
Are willing to invest in getting the decision right the first time.

miss.title: You'll be better served elsewhere if you...
items: Are looking for free advice or quick chatbot-style answers.
Need someone to do the application work for you, no questions asked.
Want to be told only what you want to hear.
Aren't ready to commit to a structured process.
Are treating this as a last-minute backup with days to a deadline.

faq.lede: The things people actually want to know before they apply — answered straight.

items.q: How much does a consultation cost, and what do I get?
items.a: Pricing is shared after the 48-hour review so you receive a quote tied to the actual scope of your situation — not a generic rate card. Every engagement includes a senior advisor, a 60-minute private session, and a written summary of agreed next steps.

items.q: How is this different from a free chat or a generic consultancy?
items.a: Two things. First, every consultation is taken by a senior advisor — not a junior associate, not a chatbot. Second, we don't sell volume. The application gate exists so we only work with people we can genuinely move forward.

items.q: What happens after the 48-hour review if I'm not accepted?
items.a: You'll get a short, honest note explaining why we're not the right fit — and where applicable, a pointer to a resource or peer firm that is. No upsell, no waitlist tricks. Roughly 4 in 10 applications don't move past this stage.

items.q: Do you guarantee admissions, scholarships, or job offers?
items.a: No, and you should be cautious of any advisor who does. What we guarantee is honest senior judgment, a clear strategy, and the same level of preparation we'd want for our own family. The decisions still belong to the schools, funders, and employers.

items.q: How are advisors matched, and can I choose mine?
items.a: After your intake we match based on country focus, industry, and the specific decision you're navigating. You'll know your advisor's name and background before the session is confirmed — and you can decline and request a different match, no questions asked.

finalCta.lede: We read every application, decide within 48 hours whether we're the right fit, and let you know either way. No fee, no obligation.
